value.Description: Verbatim event label as recorded in the source acquisition. Three vocabularies appear: stimulus presentation strings of form 'Category:IMG=ID:<file>=Type:<category>' (e.g. 'Category:IMG=ID:FYLLADIO_1.tif=Type:Leaflet_Images_1'), mouse / mouse-wheel events of form '<device> <action>' (e.g. 'MouseButtonLeft pressed', 'MouseWheelDown120 pressed'), and atomic trial markers ('fixation_cross', 'EOE').

event_class.Description: Class label derived from `value`. 'stimulus' rows are image presentations; 'response' rows are mouse or mouse-wheel events; 'marker' rows are atomic trial markers (fixation_cross at trial start, EOE at experiment end).

Levels.stimulus: Image presentation event; structured `value` of form 'Category:IMG=ID:<file>=Type:<category>'.
Levels.response: Mouse or mouse-wheel input event; `value` of form '<device> <action>' (e.g. 'MouseButtonLeft pressed').

stim_id.Description: For `event_class=stimulus` rows, the filename captured from the `ID:` field of `value` (e.g. 'FYLLADIO_1.tif'). 'n/a' for response and marker rows.

stim_category.Description: For `event_class=stimulus` rows, the category label captured from the `Type:` field of `value` (e.g. 'Leaflet_Images_1'). 'n/a' for response and marker rows.
